patterns_recognized: HARD CAP 10 four-dimension-affirm rescue fires twice today (MIL@PIT PLATINUM, OAK@CHW GOLD): both are pre-cap score=5 with F-signal, SP-xERA, PQI, and Stage 1/2 agreement all confirming the pick, the exact configuration the 6/12 ARI@CIN precedent and 7/10 CLE@MIA CONFIRM established as the CAP-10 rescue bar. CONFIRM at the CSV tier rather than treating as generic SKIP.

HARD CAP 1 (negative-edge) fires on five tier-elevated picks today (LAA@MIN -15.1pp, NYY@WSH -14.3pp, KC@BAL -10.9pp, CHC@CIN -1.5pp, ARI@LAD -20.4pp) — none are overridden upward despite several carrying agreeing SP-xERA and PQI signals, consistent with the archive's repeated lesson that CAP 1 is non-negotiable even on elite signal stacks (6/4 Sale/ATL loss, 6/21 BAL@LAD 12-1 loss after a CONFIRMed PLATINUM override).

HARD CAP 7 (pick-side bullpen disadvantage, 0-for-7 validated backtest through 7/10) fires on COL@SF DIAMOND (hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0371 on a pre-cap score=8 pick) — DOWNGRADE applied per the standing non-negotiable rule rather than trusting the otherwise-elite signal stack.

Six SKIP-tier picks carry the dual-opposition SP-xERA-against + PQI-against signature (SEA@TB, PHI@DET, HOU@TEX, ATL@STL, TOR@SD, and CLE@MIA's own SP signals point against CLE despite CLE being the pick) that the 6/8, 6/14, 6/18, and 7/9 ATL@PIT postgames flagged as a reliable opposing-team-wins predictor; SKIP is correctly withheld on all six.

BOS@NYM PENDING_SP_DATA verified genuine via live statsapi: NYM confirms Freddy Peralta but BOS carries no probable-pitcher entry at all, unlike the 7/8 slate where four PENDING labels were mislabels of already-scored CSV picks. No override possible here.

MIL @ PIT.reasoning: Pre-cap score=5/grade A: F-signal fires, SP edge 0.79 xERA (Drohan over Chandler) agrees, PQI confirms (Δ=-15.2), Stage 1/2 agree (Δ=0.01). Only HARD CAP 10 (pick_prob in (0.50,0.55]) suppresses it. This is the exact 4-dimension full-affirm profile the 6/12 ARI@CIN and 7/10 CLE@MIA precedents established as a CAP-10 rescue. Note: this is Game 2 of a MIL@PIT doubleheader (Game 1 has no announced starters yet). CONFIRM at PLATINUM.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 10 four-dimension-affirm rescue (6/12 ARI@CIN, 7/10 CLE@MIA precedent)

LAA @ MIN.reasoning: Large negative edge (-15.11pp) trips HARD CAP 1, Stage 1/2 disagree (Δ=0.18, a negative signal here rather than confirming), and HARD CAP 10 stacks on top. This is a double-cap suppression with a disagreeing Stage signal, not the 4-dimension affirm pattern -- no rescue case. CAP 1 is non-negotiable per archive (6/4, 6/21 failures on override). CONFIRM the SKIP.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 non-negotiable even with agreeing SP/PQI
Stage 1/2 disagreement blocks CAP-10 rescue eligibility

OAK @ CHW.reasoning: Pre-cap score=5/grade A: F-signal fires, SP edge 0.48 xERA (Hudson over Jump) agrees, PQI confirms (Δ=+7.3), Stage 1/2 agree (Δ=0.00). Only HARD CAP 10 (pick_prob=0.5065, bottom bucket) suppresses it. Same 4-dimension full-affirm profile as MIL@PIT tonight. CONFIRM at GOLD per the established CAP-10 rescue precedent.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 10 four-dimension-affirm rescue (6/12 ARI@CIN, 7/10 CLE@MIA precedent)

COL @ SF.reasoning: Pre-cap score=8 (clears every gate, F-signal, SP edge 1.64 agrees, PQI confirms Δ=+21.3, Stage agree) is the strongest raw stack on the slate, but HARD CAP 7 fires: hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0371 means SF's own high-leverage pen is the weaker one on a tier-elevated pick. This cap has run 0-for-7 in the tracked backtest (through 7/10 KC@BAL) and is treated as non-negotiable. DOWNGRADE to SKIP.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 7 pick-side bullpen disadvantage validated 0-for-7

NYY @ WSH.reasoning: Large negative edge (-14.27pp) trips HARD CAP 1 (score 3->1) and HARD CAP 10 stacks further (1->0), despite SP edge 2.02 xERA (Schlittler over Mikolas) and PQI both agreeing. The archive is explicit that CAP 1 must not be overridden upward regardless of agreeing SP/PQI signals (6/4 Sale/ATL, 6/21 BAL@LAD both failed on that exact override logic). CONFIRM the SKIP.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 non-negotiable even on elite SP-edge stacks

SEA @ TB.reasoning: D-grade with SP edge 1.49 xERA (Gilbert over Jax) AGAINST the pick and PQI -19.2 against as well -- the dual-opposition signature the 6/8, 6/14, 6/18, and 7/9 ATL@PIT postgames flagged as reliably predicting the opposing team. Stage 1/2 agree (Δ=0.07) doesn't offset two opposing dimensions. CONFIRM the model's own SKIP.
lessons_applied: SP-xERA-against + PQI-against dual-opposition reliable loss predictor

CLE @ MIA.reasoning: D-grade: SP edge 0.61 xERA (Perez over Bibee) AGAINST the CLE pick, PQI +18.0 against as well, fair_prob 0.409 below the 0.42 floor. This is a different signal profile from yesterday's 7/10 CLE@MIA (which had all 4 dimensions affirming CLE and was CONFIRMed at PLATINUM) -- today the same two teams meet again but the signals have flipped against CLE. CONFIRM the SKIP.
lessons_applied: SP-xERA-against + PQI-against dual-opposition reliable loss predictor
Do not carry yesterday's CLE@MIA rescue into today -- signals reversed

PHI @ DET.reasoning: Pre-cap score=1: F-signal fires but PQI runs -4.6 against the pick, and HARD CAP 10 (pick_prob=0.538) zeroes it. No SP-xERA dimension confirms, so this doesn't meet the 4-dimension affirm bar for a CAP-10 rescue (unlike MIL@PIT/OAK@CHW tonight, which had all four dimensions). Sánchez (PHI) is today's starter, not Nola, so the archive's Nola 3-for-3 note doesn't apply. CONFIRM the SKIP.
lessons_applied: CAP-10 rescue requires all 4 dimensions, not just F-signal + Stage agreement

KC @ BAL.reasoning: Large negative edge (-10.88pp) trips HARD CAP 1 (score 3->1) and HARD CAP 10 stacks (1->0), despite SP edge 1.02 xERA (Bradish over Cameron) and PQI both agreeing. Same double-cap profile as LAA@MIN, NYY@WSH, and ARI@LAD tonight -- CAP 1 is treated as non-negotiable regardless of agreeing secondary signals. CONFIRM the SKIP.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 non-negotiable even on elite SP-edge stacks

HOU @ TEX.reasoning: D-grade: SP edge 1.05 xERA (Lambert over Rocker) AGAINST the TEX pick, PQI -18.2 against as well. Textbook dual-opposition SKIP signature. CONFIRM the model's own SKIP.
lessons_applied: SP-xERA-against + PQI-against dual-opposition reliable loss predictor

CHC @ CIN.reasoning: No F-signal fires; SP edge 1.48 xERA (Assad over Lodolo) and PQI (Δ=-18.6) both agree with CHC, but a thin flat edge (-1.46pp) trips HARD CAP 1, and HARD CAP 10 stacks. With no F-signal present this also fails the CAP-10 rescue bar. CONFIRM the SKIP.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 fires even on near-zero negative edge
CAP-10 rescue requires F-signal presence

ATL @ STL.reasoning: D-grade: SP edge 1.00 xERA (Lopez over Liberatore) AGAINST the STL pick, PQI -21.5 against as well. Edge of +18.47pp sits in the SOFT CAP 6.5 calibration-caution band, but the underlying D-grade signal opposition is what's driving SKIP here, not just the edge band. CONFIRM the SKIP.
lessons_applied: SP-xERA-against + PQI-against dual-opposition reliable loss predictor

TOR @ SD.reasoning: D-grade: SP edge 1.36 xERA (Yesavage over Buehler) AGAINST the SD pick, PQI -21.2 against, team_quality modifier also against (disabled but directionally noted). Clean dual/triple-opposition SKIP. CONFIRM.
lessons_applied: SP-xERA-against + PQI-against dual-opposition reliable loss predictor

ARI @ LAD.reasoning: Large negative edge (-20.38pp) trips HARD CAP 1 (score 3->1) and HARD CAP 10 stacks (1->0). F1_xera_gap=1.67* is thin-sample-starred but F2 and F3 also fire alongside PQI confirmation, so HARD CAP 5's quarantine condition doesn't add further damage -- the negative-edge caps are what's controlling. pick_prob=0.555 keeps this under HARD CAP 9's 0.80 threshold. CONFIRM the SKIP; no override.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 non-negotiable even on elite SP-edge stacks
HARD CAP 5 quarantine satisfied by F2/F3/PQI corroboration but doesn't override CAP 1

BOS @ NYM.reasoning: Verified live via statsapi: NYM confirms Freddy Peralta as probable, but BOS carries no probable-pitcher entry at all -- this is a genuine data gap, not a mislabel of an already-scored CSV pick (contrast with the 7/8 slate's four false PENDING labels). No model pick exists to grade. CONFIRM the pending status.
lessons_applied: PENDING_SP_DATA hard stop correctly withholds ungraded games
Verified genuine vs. the 7/8 false-PENDING pattern via live statsapi check
